nodes.name: 奧雷斯山脈
nodes.summary: 奧雷斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Atlas wheatear，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 毛里塔尼亚
nodes.summary: 毛里塔尼亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联46种鸟类，包括Clapperton's spurfowl、Arabian bustard、翎頜鴇等46种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 小阿特拉斯山脈
nodes.summary: 小阿特拉斯山脈是摩洛哥的山脈，屬於阿特拉斯山脈的一部分，全長500至600公里，最高點海拔高度3,304米，山體在3億年前形成，每年平均降雨量少於200毫米。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Atlas wheatear (Oenanthe seebohmi), also known as the black-throated wheatear or Seebohm's wheatear, is a small passerine bird which breeds in the Maghreb region of North Africa and winters in the western Sahel

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Atlas wheatear has a disjunct breeding range in northwestern Africa: in north-eastern Morocco where it breeds in the Rif, the Middle Atlas, the High Atlas and central Anti Atlas mountains with another population in north-eastern Algeria in the Aurès Mountains and in the Djurdjura Range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It winters in the western Sahel, mainly in south-western Mauritania, northern Senegal and western Mali with smaller numbers in central Mali and some seen at times in winter in southern Morocco.
